name: retrovisioncalculator
title: Retro Vision Calculator
description: A "God-Tier" Retro Aesthetic Calculator. Features: - LCD Dual-Line Display: High-fidelity segment flickering and dot-matrix texture. - Draggable Widget Morphology: Move the calculator anywhere on the screen. - Mechanical Tactile Physics: Deep neomorphic buttons with 3D depress animations. - Spatial Audio: Synchronized mechanical "Clack" on every key press.
